features.title: Why Choose Virtual Business Cards?
features.subtitle: Discover the powerful features that make our virtual business cards the perfect choice for modern professionals.

items.title: Instant Sharing
items.description: Share your card via QR code, link, email, or NFC. No app required for recipients.

items.title: Real-time Updates
items.description: Update your information anytime and all shared cards automatically reflect changes.

items.title: Analytics & Insights
items.description: Track views, clicks, and contact saves with detailed analytics dashboard.

items.title: Custom Branding
items.description: Add your logo, brand colors, and custom design elements to match your identity.

items.title: Contact Integration
items.description: One-click contact saving to phone contacts, calendar, and CRM systems.

items.title: Eco-Friendly
items.description: Go paperless and reduce environmental impact while maintaining professionalism.
